message:
fix(plan): use SHA-256 for deterministic tx key hashing across processes

Replace DefaultHasher (not stable across Rust versions or processes)
with SHA-256 of canonical JSON serialization for compute_tx_key().
This makes idempotency keys deterministic everywhere, enabling
cross-process replay comparison.

Add 5 tests verifying key stability, sensitivity to correlation_id,
step ordering, step action, and preconditions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
